name: IdsDmMbrshDmSubPcaExtr

sqlReaderQuery.value: WITH cte_main AS ( SELECT COALESCE(CD1.TRGT_CD, 'UNK') AS SRC_SYS_CD, SUB_PCA.SUB_UNIQ_KEY, SUB_PCA.SUB_PCA_ACCUM_PFX_ID, SUB_PCA.PLN_YR_BEG_DT_SK, SUB_PCA.EFF_DT_SK, SUB_PCA.GRP_SK, SUB_PCA.SUB_SK, SUB_PCA.SUB_PCA_CAROVR_CALC_RULE_CD_SK, SUB_PCA.TERM_DT_SK, SUB_PCA.ALLOC_AMT, SUB_PCA.BAL_AMT, SUB_PCA.CAROVR_AMT, SUB_PCA.MAX_CAROVR_AMT, SUB_PCA.PD_AMT, GRP.GRP_ID FROM @{pipeline().globalParameters.gbl_param_IDSOwner}.SUB_PCA SUB_PCA JOIN @{pipeline().globalParameters.gbl_param_IDSOwner}.GRP GRP ON SUB_PCA.GRP_SK = GRP.GRP_SK LEFT JOIN @{pipeline().globalParameters.gbl_param_IDSOwner}.CD_MPPNG CD1 ON SUB_PCA.SRC_SYS_CD_SK = CD1.CD_MPPNG_SK WHERE SUB_PCA.SUB_PCA_SK NOT IN (1,0) AND SUB_PCA.LAST_UPDT_RUN_CYC_EXCTN_SK >= @{pipeline().parameters.IDSRunCycle} ), cte_lkp AS ( SELECT CD_MPPNG_SK, COALESCE(TRGT_CD, 'UNK') AS TRGT_CD, COALESCE(TRGT_CD_NM, 'UNK') AS TRGT_CD_NM FROM @{pipeline().globalParameters.gbl_param_IDSOwner}.CD_MPPNG ), cte_join AS ( SELECT cte_main.SRC_SYS_CD, cte_main.SUB_UNIQ_KEY, cte_main.SUB_PCA_ACCUM_PFX_ID, cte_main.PLN_YR_BEG_DT_SK, cte_main.EFF_DT_SK, cte_main.GRP_SK, cte_main.SUB_SK, cte_main.SUB_PCA_CAROVR_CALC_RULE_CD_SK, cte_main.TERM_DT_SK, cte_main.ALLOC_AMT, cte_main.BAL_AMT, cte_main.CAROVR_AMT, cte_main.MAX_CAROVR_AMT, cte_main.PD_AMT, cte_main.GRP_ID, cte_lkp.TRGT_CD AS SUB_PCA_CAROVR_CALC_RULE_CD, cte_lkp.TRGT_CD_NM AS SUB_PCA_CAROVR_CALC_RULE_NM FROM cte_main LEFT JOIN cte_lkp ON cte_main.SUB_PCA_CAROVR_CALC_RULE_CD_SK = cte_lkp.CD_MPPNG_SK ), cte_xfrm AS ( SELECT CASE WHEN dbo.trim_default(cte_join.SRC_SYS_CD) = '' THEN 'UNK' ELSE cte_join.SRC_SYS_CD END AS SRC_SYS_CD, cte_join.SUB_UNIQ_KEY, cte_join.SUB_PCA_ACCUM_PFX_ID, cte_join.PLN_YR_BEG_DT_SK, cte_join.EFF_DT_SK AS SUB_PCA_EFF_DT_SK, cte_join.GRP_SK, cte_join.GRP_ID, cte_join.SUB_SK, CASE WHEN cte_join.SUB_PCA_CAROVR_CALC_RULE_CD_SK < 2 THEN ' ' ELSE cte_join.SUB_PCA_CAROVR_CALC_RULE_CD END AS SUB_PCA_CAROVR_CALC_RULE_CD, CASE WHEN cte_join.SUB_PCA_CAROVR_CALC_RULE_CD_SK < 2 THEN ' ' ELSE cte_join.SUB_PCA_CAROVR_CALC_RULE_NM END AS SUB_PCA_CAROVR_CALC_RULE_NM, cte_join.ALLOC_AMT AS SUB_PCA_ALLOC_AMT, cte_join.BAL_AMT AS SUB_PCA_BAL_AMT, cte_join.CAROVR_AMT AS SUB_PCA_CAROVR_AMT, cte_join.MAX_CAROVR_AMT AS SUB_PCA_MAX_CAROVR_AMT, cte_join.PD_AMT AS SUB_PCA_PD_AMT, cte_join.TERM_DT_SK AS SUB_PCA_TERM_DT_SK, @{pipeline().parameters.DataMartRunCycle} AS LAST_UPDT_RUN_CYC_NO FROM cte_join ) SELECT * FROM cte_xfrm

SUB_PCA_CAROVR_CALC_RULE_CD_SK
Write SUB_PCA Data into a Sequential file for Load Job IdsDmMbrshDmSubPcaLoad.
Read all the Data from IDS SUB_PCA Table,Apply Run Cycle filters to get just the needed rows forward.
Add Defaults and Null Handling.
Job Name: IdsDmMbrshDmSubpcaExtr
